title: Eclipse (disambiguation)
content:
__NOTOC__
'''Eclipse''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Eclipse]]''', the astronomical event
*'''[[Eclipse (Deep Core)|Eclipse]]''', an astronomical object
*'''''[[Eclipse (Executor-class)|Eclipse]]''''', an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] under the command of [[Galactic Emperor|Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Sheev Palpatine]]
*'''''[[Eclipse (freighter)|Eclipse]]''''', a [[YT-209 freighter]]
*'''[[Eclipse (gambling)|Eclipse]]''', a [[gambling]] game
*'''[[Juno Eclipse]]''', a [[Galactic Empire]] [[pilot]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Eclipse/Legends|Eclipse]]''', the astronomical event

===Locations===
*'''[[Eclipse (bar)|The Eclipse]]''', a bar in [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]]
*'''[[Eclipse (hotel)|Eclipse]]''', a hotel in [[Ussa]]
*'''[[Eclipse (planet)|Eclipse]]''', a planet in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]
*'''[[Eclipse Station]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] stronghold during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
*'''[[Eclipse station (Reltooine)|Eclipse Station]]''', an [[Antigrav/Legends|antigrav]] resort on [[Reltooine]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]

===Ships and vehicles===
*'''[[Eclipse (sail barge)|Eclipse]]''', a model of [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]]
*The '''[[Eclipse (speeder bike)|Eclipse]]''', a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] model
*'''[[Eclipse-class dreadnought|''Eclipse''-class dreadnought]]''', a warship class
**'''''[[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|Eclipse]]''''', the lead ship of the ''Eclipse''-class
**'''''[[Eclipse II]]''''', the second ship in the ''Eclipse''-class
*'''''[[Eclipse (Harrower-class)|Eclipse]]''''', a [[Harrower-class dreadnought|''Harrower''-class dreadnought]]
*'''''[[Red Eclipse]]''''', a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]]/[[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]]-crewed slave ship

===Other===
*'''[[Battle of Eclipse]]''', a battle at [[Eclipse Station]]
*'''[[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]]''', an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]]
*'''[[Iron Eclipse]]''', a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] virus
*'''[[Project Eclipse]]''', a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] [[Outreach Bureau]] initiative

==Out-of-universe==
===Canon media===
*"'''[[Eclipse (short story)|Eclipse]]'''", a short story focusing on [[Breha Organa]]
*'''''[[Star Wars Eclipse]]''''', an upcoming video game

===Legends media===
*'''''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''''', a book
*'''''[[Star Wars: Agent of the Empire—Iron Eclipse]]''''', a comic story arc
*'''Eclipse''', a server on ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided]]''

{{Disambig}}

|tr=Tutulma (belirsizlik)
}}
